Join Monday Night Call

Founder

Likhitha Sree

True empowerment as key.

With over a decade of dedicated practice and 5 years of teaching, Sree brings a unique blend of ancient wisdom and modern consciousness techniques. Her journey began with a deep yearning for authentic transformation — not just physical flexibility, but true inner freedom.

She works with an unconventional and tailored approach that integrates yoga, access consciousness, energy healing, breathing, meditation, and kriyas. Each modality serves as a doorway to greater awareness and presence.

"Every session is an invitation to come home to yourself."

What sets her practice apart is the focus on awareness — not just as a technique but an approach. Every session is an invitation to come home to yourself, to discover the stillness and power that already lives within you.

Credentials

✦ Certified Access Bars Practitioner (Access Consciousness 3 Day Body Class)

✦ 10+ Years of Practice

✦ Holistic Wellness Specialist

Modalities

Every doorway leads inward.

Multi-style (agility, strength, conditioning, flexibility) · Therapy yoga · Kundalini practices. 1:1 starts wherever your body is; group works all planes with a grounding approach; kundalini begins with in-person initiation plus group support.
Access Bars · Body Process · Energetic Face Lift. Sessions are quiet and gentle. You arrive, you receive, you leave lighter.
Ease in life · Relationship issues · Emotional clarity · Getting over traumas · A different approach to mental illness · Relationship with food · Positive body image.

A student's story

"
"On the drive back from the Bars session it was a lot quieter than before. I had this positive reinforcement, this subtle energy that was telling me it's all gonna be okay soon. I've come a long way from that day — so many good things are constantly happening that now it's hard to believe it's all for real. Thank you, Likhitha. It had a huge part in where I am today."
— Yash, Climbing instructor

Ready to begin?

Start with the Monday Night Call Book a 1:1

Yoga, hands-on energy work, and consciousness practices — guided by Likhitha Sree.

True empowerment as key
